no: Every Mod and Dog v11 by Cliffette. Collection of small BG2 sidequests and encounters. Originally from Iron Modder contests. Under Her Spell (cn:3) cannot be completed if you've already entered the Planar Sphere. Forgery (cn:4) is officially DEPRECATED as unfinished.
sum: Adds a selection of small diversions and optional sidequests to Baldur's Gate II, aiming to recapture the lighter, more adventurous spirit of the original Baldur's Gate.

co.n: A Z-rated Adventure - an IM4 Non-Entry
co.no: Iron Modder practice quest. Meet a woman in the Umar Hills wilderness with a shocking problem. Helping her gains you a small and quite irritating companion. Short humorous diversion.
co.tp2n: A Z-rated Adventure - an IM4 Non-Entry

co.no: Meet Tegenk, a lovelorn troll in Druid's Grove who needs help with his romantic predicament. Iron Modder contest entry.

A stray wolf companion near Temple Ruins who follows you around. Quiet, undemanding, no toilet-training required. Adds wolf .cre, Moxen NPC, dialogue, and journal entries. Wolf scripting was reworked in later patches.
Follow-up quest at the Jermien household in Umar Hills. IMPORTANT: Cannot be completed if you've already entered the Planar Sphere — do this quest first.
DEPRECATED by author as unfinished. Only creates a single NPC creature file (clfjurg.cre). Incomplete quest content.
Adds miscellaneous bizarre NPC encounters throughout the game, reminiscent of original BG1 quirky characters. Minimal XP/item rewards — flavor content.
Lighthearted nature-themed encounter with Reene and her squirrel companions.
